'''P-60''', and its superior, [[P-59]], were the two [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]] summoned by [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] to keep [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] from penetrating the bridge of the [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']]. The droidekas ended up forcing the pair of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] to escape into a vent as a result of their firepower.
